title: Plea in Karnataka HC against singing entire Vande Mataram in schools including references to Hindu deities
description: A lawyer has filed a public interest litigation (PIL) petition before the Karnataka High Court questioning the Central government's recent instruction for all schools to start their day by singing all six stanzas of the national song, Vande Mataram, including stanzas that refer to Hindu deities. The petitioner maintained that he does not dispute the patriotic character of the first two stanzas of the song.
